entries.title: Crypto Firms Race to 'Quantum-Proof' Wallets Before Bitcoin, Ethereum Networks Catch Up
entries.summary: Crypto companies are upgrading wallets to counter the coming quantum computing threat, but gaps remain.

entries.title: AI Models Scheme, Betray and Vote Each Other Out in Survivor-Style Game
entries.summary: Researchers say multiplayer games may reveal AI behavior that static tests miss.

entries.title: Australian Police Seize Millions in Bitcoin From Alleged Darknet Marketplace Operator
entries.summary: Two men face money laundering and drug charges following the seizure of $4.2 million in Bitcoin from alleged darknet marketplace dealings.

entries.title: Olympic Sprinter Can't Outrun Charges in UK Crypto Fraud Investigation
entries.summary: U.K. police charged British sprinter CJ Ujah in an alleged crypto fraud scheme involving wallet seed phrase theft and impersonation calls.

entries.title: Banking Industry Says Clarity Act Stablecoin Proposal Would Enable 'Evasion'
entries.summary: Senators had hoped the issue, which has plagued crypto legislation for months, had been put to bed with a proposed compromise last week.

entries.title: TeraWulf's AI Compute Revenue Outpaces Bitcoin Mining Amid $427 Million Loss
entries.summary: Publicly traded Bitcoin miner and data center operator TeraWulf reported a hefty net loss in Q1 as its AI revenue took over from BTC.

entries.title: Intel Stock Hits All-Time High After Preliminary Chip Deal With Apple
entries.summary: A preliminary Apple-Intel manufacturing agreement—backed by a White House push—sent Intel stock above $130 on Friday.

entries.title: Elizabeth Warren Wants Meta to Spill All on Stablecoin Plans Ahead of Clarity Act Votes
entries.summary: The Senate Democrat said Meta’s reported plans to partner with a third-party stablecoin issuer could undermine “competition, privacy… and financial stability.”

entries.title: Will Strategy Sell Bitcoin This Year? Traders Are Convinced After Saylor Comments
entries.summary: Users of Myriad's prediction market believe it's likely Strategy will part ways with some of its Bitcoin holdings this year.

entries.title: Trump Admin Launches Pentagon UFO Website With Declassified Files
entries.summary: The new website follows years of hearings, investigations, and pressure for greater UAP transparency.

entries.title: Kraken Parent Payward Applies for OCC National Trust Bank Charter
entries.summary: Crypto exchange Kraken is seeking a U.S. federal banking charter to complement its Wyoming SPDI subsidiary.

entries.title: Bitcoin Miner IREN Secures $3.4 Billion Nvidia AI Deal, With $2.1 Billion Share Option
entries.summary: Nvidia gains rights to invest up to $2.1 billion in IREN as companies race to lock down massive AI compute capacity.

entries.title: ECB’s Lagarde Pushes Back on Euro Stablecoins, Warns of ‘Structural Weaknesses’
entries.summary: The European Central Bank chief says Europe "knows which port it is sailing to,” and it's not towards a euro stablecoin.

entries.title: Coinbase Outage Disrupts Crypto Trading and Transfers Amid Amazon Service Failure
entries.summary: Coinbase says Amazon Web Services failures across multiple availability zones caused an extended outage on its platform.

entries.title: AI Won’t End Human Work, Andreessen Horowitz Partner Says
entries.summary: a16z partner David George argues AI will reshape work instead of erasing it.

entries.title: Bitcoin Price Crashes Near Zero on Revolut, Blamed on Third-Party Service Disruption
entries.summary: Bitcoin briefly plummeted to about 2 cents on Revolut due to what the financial platform described as a third-party service disruption.

entries.title: XRP New Addresses, Active Supply Plunge Amid Shift to ‘Institutional Rails’
entries.summary: New XRP addresses hit multi-year lows, per Glassnode data, as the network shifts from "retail speculation" to institutional usage.

entries.title: Zcash Targeting Post-Quantum Crypto Milestone by 2027
entries.summary: The privacy-focused cryptocurrency plans to launch a quantum-recoverable wallet within a month as it outlines its roadmap.

entries.title: Morning Minute: Coinbase Misses Earnings on Surprise Loss
entries.summary: Coinbase missed earnings, but one of its newest businesses is scaling incredibly fast—and Tom Lee may finally be slowing his Ethereum buying.

entries.title: Arbitrum DAO Votes to Unlock $70 Million for Kelp DAO Exploit Relief
entries.summary: Arbitrum DAO voted to release the Kelp exploit funds, but a U.S. Court restraining notice has put the approved transfer in legal jeopardy.

entries.title: AUSTRAC Launches Supervision Campaigns as Australia's Crypto Regulatory Reforms Kick In
entries.summary: The campaigns target over-the-counter operators and local exchanges as new laws expand oversight to custody and brokerage services.

entries.title: LayerZero Admits Mistake in 1/1 DVN Setup Tied to $292M Kelp Hack
entries.summary: LayerZero Labs acknowledged a Lazarus Group attack on internal RPCs and a multisig signer's unauthorized personal trade, impacting 0.36% of assets on the protocol.

entries.title: MegaETH Kicks Off MEGA Buybacks
entries.summary: Future repurchases will follow a preset schedule and be routed through on-chain markets.

entries.title: ONDO Surges 68% in a Week amid US Tokenization Push
entries.summary: A four-firm pilot settling the first cross-border, cross-bank redemption of tokenized U.S. Treasuries on the XRP Ledger extended a rally sparked by Ondo's seat at the DTCC’s tokenization table.

entries.title: Kraken Parent Payward Seeks US Federal Trust Charter
entries.summary: Payward says the OCC national trust charter would complement Kraken's banking arm, Kraken Financial.

entries.title: ECB's Lagarde: Euro Stablecoins Aren't the Answer, Build Public Infrastructure Instead
entries.summary: The President of the European Central Bank spoke against EUR-pegged stablecoins at the inaugural Banco de España LatAm Economic Forum today.

entries.title: Bitcoin Slips Under $80,000 As ETFs Snap Five-Day Inflow Streak
entries.summary: Tron, Cardano and Solana led weekly gains among the Top 10, while Bitcoin and Ether lagged as US spot ETF demand cooled on Thursday.
